storyboard.content: I've been needing to urinate much more frequently than I used to. It's been happening more and more over the past few months.
My urine stream is a lot weaker than it used to be. It used to be strong and now it's just a trickle.
I feel like I can never fully empty my bladder. Even after I go, it feels like there's still something left.
I'm waking up 2 to 3 times every night to use the bathroom. It's really affecting my sleep.
This has been gradually getting worse over about 6 months. It's been a slow change, not sudden.
There's no pain at all, just discomfort and inconvenience. It's annoying but I can still manage my daily life — it mainly just disrupts my sleep.
I'm a 62-year-old man. I don't have any known urinary or prostate conditions that have been diagnosed.
